Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (organic farming tax credit)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (organic farming tax credit)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Income Tax Act to establish a tax credit for expenses incurred in relation to organic farming.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Subsection.Text: Section 127 of the Income Tax Act is amended by adding the following after subsection (2):

There may be deducted from the tax otherwise payable under this Part for a taxation year by a taxpayer whose chief source of income for the taxation year is farming an amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the appropriate percentage for the year; and

is the lesser of $500,000 and the total of all amounts each of which is an expense incurred by the taxpayer during the year for goods acquired or services received for the purpose of producing or processing an agricultural product that has been certified as organic in accordance with the regulations made under the Canada Agricultural Products Act.

Subsection.Text: Subsection (1) applies to the 2019 and subsequent taxation years.
